summary_en: 72,115,300 shares acquired for ¥149,999,824,000 (2.6% of shares outstanding) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-27. Cumulative total under May 15, 2026 board resolution authorizing up to 100M shares (3.6% S/O) and ¥150B (May 18, 2026–Mar 31, 2027 window). Buyback program now complete.
title_en: Notice of acquisition result and completion of acquisition of treasury shares through off-auction trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Japan Post Holdings completed its treasury share acquisition program on May 27, 2026. The company purchased 72,115,300 shares for a total of ¥149,999,824,000 via ToSTNeT-3 (off-auction trading on the Tokyo Stock Exchange), representing 2.6% of shares outstanding. This final tranche exhausts the buyback authorization issued by the board on May 15, 2026, which had set an upper limit of 100 million shares (3.6% of outstanding) and ¥150 billion across a window from May 18, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The program is now fully executed.
